visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A close-up shot focuses on a hand holding a smartphone which displays a large camera lens graphic on its screen. The background consists of a brightly lit electronics retail store with blurred product displays and white floor tiles. (2) A man wearing a dark newsboy cap, glasses, and a green jersey with the text 'ROOTS 1973' appears on screen. He speaks directly to the camera with an animated facial expression, gesturing with his right hand against an orange wall with white pendant lights. (3) A screen capture of a YouTube channel interface titled '3cTim哥生活日常' is shown, featuring various video thumbnails. A red arrow points specifically to the 'Live' tab in the navigation bar. (4) The man returns to the frame in a retail setting, holding up four fingers and speaking enthusiastically. The background shows retail shelves and bright overhead studio lighting. (5) The man stands next to a large red product box for a 'Nintendo Switch 2' placed on a black shelf. He looks down at the box and gestures towards it with both hands while speaking. (6) A close-up shows the product box more clearly, featuring imagery of a handheld console and controllers. Animated graphic stars and sparkles are overlaid on the frame to emphasize the item. (7) Two hands hold a smartphone displaying the Starlux Airlines website, showing a flight search between Taipei (TPE) and San Francisco (SFO). The background is a white retail counter. (8) The man stands in a wide area of a 'Taiwan Mobile' retail store, with a large logo visible on a pillar behind him. He uses both hands to gesture broadly while delivering a final call to action.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 聽說今年iPhone 17賣更貴耶!!. [Logo]: @3ctim. (2) [Subtitle]: 沒有關係. (3) [Subtitle]: 先來看我們. (4) [Variety]: 9月我們一起看 蘋果發表會直播. (5) [Subtitle]: iPhone 17全系列. (6) [Subtitle]: 直接抽!!. (7) [Subtitle]: 如果我們達到百萬的話. (8) [Subtitle]: iPhone 17全系列 乘以2. (9) [Subtitle]: Switch 2~. (10) [Subtitle]: 老闆 我最近在猶豫要不要買. (11) [Subtitle]: 沒有關係. (12) [Subtitle]: 不用買. (13) [Variety]: 參加我們9月蘋果發表會直播. (14) [Subtitle]: 就有機會抽Switch 2. (15) [Subtitle]: 瑪利歐賽車的同捆包. (16) [Subtitle]: 老闆 現在暑假一波出國潮. (17) [Variety]: 好想出國. (18) [Subtitle]: 我想出國 但沒錢耶. (19) [Subtitle]: 沒關係. (20) [Variety]: 參加我們9月蘋果發表會直播. (21) [Subtitle]: 就有機會抽. (22) [Subtitle]: 星宇航空 來回機票!! 日本/舊金山. (23) [Variety]: 包辦你一年份eSIM網路!. [Subtitle]: 還送你eSIM一年免費. (24) [Subtitle]: 讓你用到飽. (25) [Subtitle]: 現在馬上訂閱追蹤我們頻道. (26) [Subtitle]: 到時候還有更多大獎 讓你來抽. (27) [Variety]: 總價值超過40万. [Subtitle]: 總獎金超過40萬. (28) [Subtitle]: 這次我真的誠意十足. (29) [Subtitle]: 就等你來拿.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator (3cTim), and 1 person whose hands are visible holding devices.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with short hair, wearing black-rimmed glasses, a dark grey newsboy cap, and a dark green jersey with white text and a white collar.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video alternates between a retail store with bright orange walls and white lights, a YouTube channel interface, and a 'Taiwan Mobile' branded storefront area with large pillars and display screens.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A secondary male voice speaks with a moderate, inquisitive tone about device prices. A digital 'pop' SFX triggers, followed immediately by upbeat, high-tempo electronic BGM with a clear 4-on-the-floor beat. (2) The primary male speaker (3cTim) takes over with high arousal and energetic vocal delivery. A sharp 'whoosh' SFX occurs during a visual cut to the YouTube interface. (3) The primary speaker continues describing the giveaway event with increasing intensity. A 'ding' SFX marks the mention of special prize items. (4) A brief interaction occurs where the secondary voice expresses a desire to travel, followed by another 'whoosh' transition sound. The main speaker maintains a fast speech rate and bright vocal timbre. (5) The music continues at a steady volume as the speaker lists airline tickets and eSIM prizes, emphasizing keywords with rising intonation. (6) The vocal delivery remains assertive and clear through the final seconds, with a brief rhythmic swell in the BGM before a hard cut at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Introduction of User Problem -> Solution (Prize Reveal 1) -> Solution (Prize Reveal 2) -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-energy promotional teaser for a YouTube channel giveaway event. By addressing common tech and lifestyle pain points (high phone prices, wanting a new console, expensive travel), the creator positions his upcoming September Apple event livestream as the solution through multiple big-ticket giveaways (iPhone 17, Switch 2, Flight Tickets).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speaker explicitly presents high-value products and services as prizes for a specific event to drive channel engagement and subscriptions.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy social media edit featuring a well-known tech influencer, characterized by fast cuts and prominent text overlays to maintain viewer attention.
